# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  EventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 3600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30

  EventTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: EventTopic

  EventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      QueueUrls:
        - !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:AddPermission
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:RemovePermission
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the EventQueue
    Value: !Ref EventQueue
  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the EventTopic
    Value: !Ref EventTopic
